languages.text: "Не вижу здесь никакой срочности. Вигдис, я займусь этой проблемой позднее".

traits.locale_text: "Не вижу здесь никакой срочности. Вигдис, я займусь этой проблемой позднее".

languages.text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."
languages.original_text: "Не вижу здесь никакой срочности. Вигдис, я займусь этой проблемой позднее".

traits.locale_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."
"I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."
"I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

languages.text: 「ここには緊急性を必要としない。ヴィグディス、この問題は後ほど扱う。」
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

languages.text: "Burada bir aciliyet görmüyorum. Vigdis, bu sorunla daha sonra ilgileneceğim."
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

traits.locale_text: "Burada bir aciliyet görmüyorum. Vigdis, bu sorunla daha sonra ilgileneceğim."

languages.text: “我不认为这是什么紧急的事。维格迪斯，这个问题我稍后再处理。”
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

traits.locale_text: “我不认为这是什么紧急的事。维格迪斯，这个问题我稍后再处理。”

languages.text: "Ich erkenne hier keine Dringlichkeit. Vigdis, ich werde mich später mit diesem Problem befassen."
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

traits.locale_text: "Ich erkenne hier keine Dringlichkeit. Vigdis, ich werde mich später mit diesem Problem befassen."

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas où est l'urgence. Nous verrons cela plus tard, Vigdis. »
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas où est l'urgence. Nous verrons cela plus tard, Vigdis. »

languages.text: «No veo motivo de urgencia, Vigdis. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».
languages.original_text: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."

traits.locale_text: «No veo motivo de urgencia, Vigdis. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».
